panels.description: Hours since the last successful Jira sync. Green ≤ 12 h • Yellow 12–24 h • Red > 24 h.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - finished_at)) / 3600.0, 1) AS "Data Age (h)"
FROM sync_log
WHERE status IN ('success', 'partial') AND finished_at IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY finished_at DESC LIMIT 1

panels.title: Data Age

panels.description: Average % of story points added or removed after sprint start (lower = more stable plans). Target: ≤ 10%

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(
  100.0 * (COALESCE(added.sp,0) + COALESCE(removed.sp,0))
  / NULLIF(pd.committed_points, 0)
)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp FROM sprint_issues WHERE was_in_initial_scope = FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) added ON added.sprint_id = pd.sprint_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp FROM sprint_issues WHERE removed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) removed ON removed.sprint_id = pd.sprint_id
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
  )
  AND pd.state = 'closed' AND pd.committed_points > 0
  AND date_trunc('quarter', pd.start_date) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Scope Change %

panels.description: Average % of committed story points delivered (delivery % per sprint). Target: ≥ 80%

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(delivery_pct)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
  )
  AND pd.state = 'closed' AND pd.delivery_pct IS NOT NULL
  AND date_trunc('quarter', pd.start_date) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Planning Accuracy %

panels.description: Issues sent back from testing to In Progress this quarter. Lower = better quality.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.issue_key) AS value
FROM issue_transitions t JOIN issues i ON i.key = t.issue_key
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND LOWER(t.from_status) LIKE '%test%'
  AND LOWER(t.to_status) LIKE '%progress%'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', t.transitioned_at) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Ticket Reopens

panels.description: Average hours from creation to resolution for Blocker-priority issues. Target: ≤ 1 sprint.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at))/3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM issues
WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND priority = 'Blocker'
  AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL
  AND date_trunc('quarter', created_at) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Blocker Resolution Time

panels.description: % of bugs raised this quarter that are closed (Done). Target: ≥ 80%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status_category = 'Done')
  / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0)::numeric, 1
) AS value
FROM issues
WHERE project_key IN ($project)
  AND issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', created_at) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Bug Closure Rate

panels.description: Avg % of committed Stories/Tasks per sprint that meet Definition of Ready (Assignee, QA, SP, Acceptance Criteria, Epic). Target: ≥ 80%.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_dor AS (
  SELECT
    si.sprint_id,
    COUNT(*) AS total,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE i.assignee IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0) > 0
        AND i.has_acceptance_criteria = TRUE
        AND i.epic_key IS NOT NULL
    ) AS ready
  FROM sprint_issues si
  JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id
  WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
    AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task', 'Bug')
    AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    AND si.removed_at IS NULL
    AND s.state = 'closed'
    AND date_trunc('quarter', s.start_date) = '$quarter'::date
    AND s.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
    )
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 0
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(100.0 * ready / NULLIF(total, 0))::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM sprint_dor

panels.title: Avg Tickets DOR Rate

panels.description: Avg % of Done Stories/Tasks per sprint that meet Definition of Done (Assignee, QA, SP, Acceptance Criteria, Epic). Target: ≥ 80%.

targets.rawSql:
WITH sprint_dod AS (
  SELECT
    si.sprint_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE i.status = 'Done'
    ) AS total_done,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (
      WHERE i.status = 'Done'
        AND i.assignee IS NOT NULL
        AND i.qa_assignee IS NOT NULL
        AND COALESCE(si.story_points_at_add, i.story_points, 0) > 0
        AND i.has_acceptance_criteria = TRUE
        AND i.epic_key IS NOT NULL
    ) AS done_dod
  FROM sprint_issues si
  JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key
  JOIN sprints s ON s.id = si.sprint_id
  WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
    AND i.issue_type NOT IN ('Epic', 'Sub-task', 'Bug')
    AND si.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    AND si.removed_at IS NULL
    AND s.state = 'closed'
    AND date_trunc('quarter', s.start_date) = '$quarter'::date
    AND s.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
    )
  GROUP BY si.sprint_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) FILTER (
    WHERE i.status = 'Done'
  ) > 0
)
SELECT ROUND(AVG(100.0 * done_dod / NULLIF(total_done, 0))::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM sprint_dod

panels.title: Avg Tickets DOD Rate

panels.description: Weighted bug score per release: (Blocker×5 + Critical×4 + High×3 + Medium×2 + Low×1) divided by number of releases in the quarter. Lower is better.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(
  COALESCE(SUM(
    CASE i.priority
      WHEN 'Blocker'  THEN 5
      WHEN 'Critical' THEN 4
      WHEN 'High'     THEN 3
      WHEN 'Medium'   THEN 2
      WHEN 'Low'      THEN 1
      ELSE 0
    END
  ), 0)::numeric
  / NULLIF((
    SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT r2.id)
    FROM releases r2
    WHERE r2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND r2.released = TRUE
      AND date_trunc('quarter', r2.release_date) = '$quarter'::date
  ), 0),
  1
) AS value
FROM releases r
JOIN issues i
  ON r.name = ANY(i.fix_versions)
 AND r.project_key = i.project_key
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND r.released = TRUE
  AND date_trunc('quarter', r.release_date) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Release Quality Score

panels.description: Story points added + removed after sprint start as % of committed SP. Target ≤ 10%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pd.sprint_name AS "Sprint",
  COALESCE(ROUND(100.0*(COALESCE(added.sp,0)+COALESCE(removed.sp,0))/NULLIF(pd.committed_points,0)::numeric,1),0) AS "Scope Change %",
  COALESCE(added.cnt,0) AS "Issues Added",
  COALESCE(removed.cnt,0) AS "Issues Removed"
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sprint_issues WHERE was_in_initial_scope=FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) added ON added.sprint_id=pd.sprint_id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sprint_issues WHERE removed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) removed ON removed.sprint_id=pd.sprint_id
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
  )
  AND pd.state='closed' AND pd.committed_points>0
  AND date_trunc('quarter', pd.start_date) = '$quarter'::date
ORDER BY pd.start_date ASC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Scope Change % per Sprint

panels.description: Committed SP, Delivered SP (committed issues that are Done), and Planning Accuracy % per sprint. Target ≥ 80%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pd.sprint_name AS "Sprint",
  COALESCE(pd.committed_points, 0) AS "Committed SP",
  COALESCE(pd.delivered_points, 0) AS "Delivered SP",
  COALESCE(pd.delivery_pct, 0) AS "Planning Accuracy %"
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
  )
  AND pd.state = 'closed'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', pd.start_date) = '$quarter'::date
ORDER BY pd.start_date ASC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Planning Accuracy % per Sprint

panels.description: Issues returned from testing to In Progress per week. Spike = quality issues escaping.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', t.transitioned_at) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT t.issue_key) AS "Reopened Issues"
FROM issue_transitions t JOIN issues i ON i.key=t.issue_key
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND LOWER(t.from_status) LIKE '%test%'
  AND LOWER(t.to_status) LIKE '%progress%'
  AND $__timeFilter(t.transitioned_at)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Weekly Ticket Reopen Rate

panels.description: Issues that required the most rework this quarter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT t.issue_key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary", i.assignee AS "Assignee",
  i.priority AS "Priority", COUNT(*) AS "Times Reopened"
FROM issue_transitions t JOIN issues i ON i.key=t.issue_key
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND LOWER(t.from_status) LIKE '%test%'
  AND LOWER(t.to_status) LIKE '%progress%'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', t.transitioned_at) = '$quarter'::date
GROUP BY t.issue_key, i.summary, i.assignee, i.priority
ORDER BY 5 DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Most Reopened Issues

panels.description: Average hours to resolve Blocker-priority issues per sprint. Target: ≤ 168h (1 sprint).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.name AS "Sprint",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at))/3600.0)::numeric,1) AS "Avg Hours to Resolve"
FROM issues i
JOIN sprint_issues si ON si.issue_key=i.key AND si.was_in_initial_scope=TRUE
JOIN sprints s ON s.id=si.sprint_id
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.priority='Blocker'
  AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL
  AND date_trunc('quarter', s.start_date) = '$quarter'::date
  AND s.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT si2.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si2
    JOIN issues i2 ON i2.key = si2.issue_key
    WHERE i2.project_key IN ($project)
      AND si2.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    GROUP BY si2.sprint_id
    HAVING COUNT(*) * 2 > (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM sprint_issues si3
      WHERE si3.sprint_id = si2.sprint_id AND si3.was_in_initial_scope = TRUE
    )
  )
GROUP BY s.name, s.start_date ORDER BY s.start_date ASC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Blocker Resolution Time per Sprint

panels.description: Currently open Blocker-priority issues ordered by age.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT key AS "Key", summary AS "Summary",
  COALESCE(assignee,'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",
  status AS "Status",
  DATE_PART('day', NOW()-created_at)::int AS "Age (days)"
FROM issues
WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND priority='Blocker' AND status_category!='Done'
ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Open Blockers

panels.description: Count of Blocker, Critical and High bugs fixed in released versions for the selected team and quarter. Lower is better.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN releases r ON r.name = ANY(i.fix_versions) AND r.project_key = i.project_key
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND r.released = TRUE
  AND i.priority IN ('Blocker', 'Critical', 'High')
  AND date_trunc('quarter', r.release_date) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Major Bugs in Releases

panels.description: Count of Blocker-priority bugs fixed in released versions. These represent critical production issues.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN releases r ON r.name = ANY(i.fix_versions) AND r.project_key = i.project_key
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND r.released = TRUE
  AND i.priority = 'Blocker'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', r.release_date) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Blocker Bugs in Releases

panels.description: All bugs (any priority) fixed in released versions for the selected team and quarter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(*) AS value
FROM issues i
JOIN releases r ON r.name = ANY(i.fix_versions) AND r.project_key = i.project_key
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND r.released = TRUE
  AND date_trunc('quarter', r.release_date) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Total Bugs in Releases

panels.description: Number of bugs per released version, stacked by priority. Shows which releases had the most quality issues.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT r.name AS "Release",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.priority = 'Blocker')  AS "Blocker",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.priority = 'Critical') AS "Critical",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.priority = 'High')     AS "High",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.priority = 'Medium')   AS "Medium",
  COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE i.priority = 'Low')      AS "Low"
FROM releases r
JOIN issues i ON r.name = ANY(i.fix_versions) AND r.project_key = i.project_key
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND r.released = TRUE
  AND date_trunc('quarter', r.release_date) = '$quarter'::date
GROUP BY r.name, r.release_date
ORDER BY r.release_date ASC

panels.title: Bugs per Release (by Priority)

panels.description: Blocker, Critical and High bugs per release. Click Key to open in Jira.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT r.name AS "Release", r.release_date AS "Release Date",
  i.key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary",
  i.priority AS "Priority", i.status AS "Status",
  COALESCE(i.assignee, 'Unassigned') AS "Assignee"
FROM releases r
JOIN issues i ON r.name = ANY(i.fix_versions) AND r.project_key = i.project_key
WHERE i.issue_type = 'Bug'
  AND i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND r.released = TRUE
  AND i.priority IN ('Blocker', 'Critical', 'High')
  AND date_trunc('quarter', r.release_date) = '$quarter'::date
ORDER BY r.release_date DESC,
  CASE i.priority WHEN 'Blocker' THEN 1 WHEN 'Critical' THEN 2 WHEN 'High' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
  i.key

panels.title: Major Bug Details per Release

list.label: Jira URL
list.name: jira_url
list.query: SELECT value FROM app_settings WHERE key = 'jira_url'

list.label: Team / Project
list.name: project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.label: Quarter
list.name: quarter
list.query: SELECT CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created_at)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)::int) AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('quarter', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM issues WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2 DESC
